falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a bullish trend reversal, invalidating the 'unknown' verdict by showing clear momentum against the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 2x the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a phase change

falsification_conditions.condition: Central bank announces rate cut of 50bps or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Introduces a major exogenous factor that would override the pattern-based analysis, making the current verdict obsolete

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
